title: Amtech G0750 50mm (2") Heavy Duty Scraper with Wooden Handle
features: DURABLE: This 50mm (2") heavy duty scraper has a stainless steel blade and a strong hardwood handle with brass rivets
VERSATILE: It is ideal for scraping off flaky paint or applying filler
SIZE CAPACITY: 2 inch / 50 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
SMOOTH OPERATION: Engineered to deliver consistent performance
PLUMBING APPLICATIONS: Essential for household and trade pipework
description: Product Description Am-Tech heavy duty scraper. Stainless steel blade. Hardwood handle with brass rivets. Measures 2-inch. Display packed.Am Tech provides a 12 Month guarantee on all their products. Am Tech only use the best materials in their products to provide a product that meets your expectations Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Scraper See more
